Header.title: Master your computer, one simple step at a time
Header.paragraph: Welcome to Tech Support, a friendly place built specifically for those who are new to the world of computers. Whether you want to learn how to use a mouse, find information safely on the web, or send your first email, our easy-to-follow lessons are here to help you build confidence at your own pace. We use large text, clear buttons, and simple instructions—with no confusing technical jargon — to ensure you always feel in control of your learning journey.
